sourceSummary.oneLine: Three-sheet CYAN indicator circuit schematic for GT1717C and GT1717CP source folder, showing the CYAN_Indicator.sch drawing and component connections.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design history file submission material for circuit schematic documentation.
keyPoints: Drawing title appears as CAYN_Indicator and drawing number as CYAN_Indicator.sch.
Revision is shown as 2.0 and the sheet set is shown as 3 sheets.
Circuit elements include TEMT6000X01, LM358BIDR, connectors, LEDs, resistors, capacitors, headers, and power nets VCC_AED and VCC_3V3.

concepts.name: Indicator Power and Link LEDs
concepts.evidence: POWER LINK ... D1 D2 ... PWR_LED ETH_LED_LINK

evidence.claim: The document is an indicator circuit schematic associated with CYAN_Indicator.sch.
The source folder identifies the indicator schematic as for GT1717C and GT1717CP.
The revision shown in the drawing title block is 2.0.
The drawing includes a date value of 2025-08-20.
The circuit includes TEMT6000X01 and LM358BIDR components.
The schematic includes POWER and LINK indicator labels with D1 and D2.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
